Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0810 "RISK-THEEDGE-07B6-0810" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $07b6 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "R.I.S.K. (The Edge).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $07B6 to set the border colour to black and copy 32 bytes to $02A7 to allow the game to run properly. This is needed to skip the lengthy decompression step.
